gotoHome.name: Go to Home
gotoHome.description: Quickly switch to the Home page.

toggleNav.name: Toggle Navigation
toggleNav.description: Collapse or expand the side navigation.

gotoSettings.name: Go to Settings
gotoSettings.description: Quickly switch to the Settings page.

gotoMonitor.name: Go to Monitor
gotoMonitor.description: Quickly switch to the Monitor page.

gotoKeymap.name: Go to Keymap
gotoKeymap.description: Quickly switch to the Keymap page.

settings.name: Settings
settings.description: Theme, language, and shared plugin variables

connection.name: Database Connection
connection.description: Default connection string for migration commands

runtime.name: .NET Runtime Host
runtime.description: Deploy and manage local .NET release packages

settings.title: Translation Settings
settings.description: Enable or disable subtitle translation and configure the current provider.
settings.hint: Save changes to apply them to the live subtitle pipeline.
settings.enabledHint: Translation is enabled. Review provider credentials before starting capture.
settings.disabledHint: Translation is disabled. The workspace will only show original subtitles.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: Keep translation turned off and only show the source subtitle.

echo.label: Echo
echo.description: Local debug mode. Prefix the source text with the target language.

openaiCompatible.label: OpenAI-Compatible
openaiCompatible.description: Send subtitle text to a Chat Completions compatible endpoint.

validation.endpoint: Endpoint is required for the OpenAI-compatible provider.
validation.model: Model is required for the OpenAI-compatible provider.

empty.selectRegionDescription: Choose the subtitle band first. The workspace starts sampling after capture begins.
empty.originalOnlyDescription: Translation is disabled. The workspace will still capture and stabilize the original subtitle text.
empty.readyDescription: Region, OCR, and translation are all configured. Start capture to stream subtitle updates.

hint.paused: Capture loop paused. Resume when you want to continue sampling.
hint.pipelineFailed: Pipeline failed. Review the run log and OCR configuration.
hint.regionSelected: Region locked. Start capture when ready.
hint.running: Capture, OCR, stabilization, and translation are running.
hint.frameSkipped: Frame change detection skipped this cycle.
hint.ocrFailed: OCR could not extract readable text from this frame.
hint.stabilizing: Comparing the latest OCR result with recent subtitle history.
hint.selectRegion: Select the subtitle band to unlock the live workspace.
hint.ready: Translation is configured. Start capture to produce bilingual subtitles.
hint.originalOnly: Translation is disabled. Start capture to preview the original subtitle only.

error.noReadableText: No readable subtitle text was detected.

log.empty: Run one capture cycle to inspect OCR and translation output.

selection.instruction: Drag to select the subtitle band. Release to confirm. Press Esc or right-click to cancel.

targetLanguage.name: Target Language
targetLanguage.description: Translation target language, for example zh-CN or en-US.

captureInterval.name: Capture Interval
captureInterval.validation: Capture interval must be a positive integer.

showSource.name: Show Source
showSource.description: Whether to display the original subtitle text.

showTranslation.name: Show Translation
showTranslation.description: Whether to display translated subtitle text.

ocrPadding.name: OCR Padding
ocrPadding.description: Extra padding added around the selected subtitle region before OCR.
ocrPadding.validation: OCR padding must be a non-negative integer.

similarityThreshold.name: Similarity Threshold
similarityThreshold.description: Subtitle similarity threshold for deduplication and stabilization.
similarityThreshold.validation: Similarity threshold must be between 0 and 1.

minRefreshInterval.name: Min Refresh Interval
minRefreshInterval.description: Minimum interval between stable subtitle refreshes in milliseconds.
minRefreshInterval.validation: Minimum refresh interval must be a non-negative integer.

stabilizationWindow.name: Stabilization Window
stabilizationWindow.description: Time window used to stabilize OCR subtitle updates in milliseconds.
stabilizationWindow.validation: Stabilization window must be a non-negative integer.

frameChangeDetection.name: Frame Change Detection
frameChangeDetection.description: Skip OCR when the sampled frame has no significant change.

frameChangeThreshold.name: Frame Change Threshold
frameChangeThreshold.description: Sensitivity threshold for frame change detection.
frameChangeThreshold.validation: Frame change threshold must be between 0 and 1.

translationProvider.name: Translation Provider
translationProvider.description: Translation backend provider. Use disabled to keep original subtitles only.

translationModel.name: Translation Model
translationModel.description: Model name used by the translation provider.

translationEndpoint.name: Translation Endpoint
translationEndpoint.description: Custom API endpoint for the translation provider.

translationApiKey.name: Translation API Key
translationApiKey.description: API key used to call the translation endpoint.

settings.title: Host Settings
settings.description: Manage shared preferences in one place

basic.title: Basic Settings
basic.description: Control appearance, language, and close behavior

fields.closeBehaviorDescription: Choose tray minimize or direct exit

messages.interWarning: Inter may show fallback or weight issues in some Chinese UI scenarios

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Configure the root directory and migration defaults
workspace.useForMigration: Use workspace by default for migrations

variables.title: Plugin Variables
variables.description: Manage plugin variables in one place
variables.createDescription: Only the variable value is persisted

empty.title: No reports available
empty.description: When plugins register home reports, they will appear here automatically.

report.noRecentDiagnostics: There have been no recent errors or warnings.

pluginOverview.title: Plugin Overview
pluginOverview.description: Shows enabled, running, and faulted plugin states.

recentDiagnostics.title: Recent Diagnostics
recentDiagnostics.description: Shows the latest host errors and warnings.

header.contextError: Global diagnostics are mapped to the current plugin runtime.
header.contextHealthy: Runtime health is stable across the current plugin set.

details.runtimeSwitchDescription: Stopping only affects the current runtime instance and does not change whether the plugin is enabled.
details.diagnosticsDescription: Shows recent exceptions whose diagnostic records match the current plugin name or id.
details.noDiagnostics: There are no diagnostics matched to this plugin.

home.noFaultedPlugins: There are no faulted plugins right now.

keymap.description: Search commands and choose one binding to inspect or override.
keymap.overrideHint: Overrides take effect immediately and replace the default binding until you reset it.

empty.title: Select a shortcut
empty.description: Choose a binding from the left to inspect the current value and make changes.

keymap.currentBindingDescription: Focus the capture box and press the new shortcut. Press Escape to cancel recording.
keymap.modifiedHint: This binding currently overrides the default value.
keymap.enabledDescription: Disabled bindings are skipped by the runtime shortcut handler.

header.context: Shortcut bindings are grouped by plugin for browsing and editing.

promptor.apiSettingsDescription: Configure the model provider, endpoint, credential, and generation parameters used by Promptor.
promptor.apiSettingsPresetSummary: Current preset: endpoint {0}, model {1}, max tokens {2}, temperature {3}. Usually only the API key is required.
promptor.apiSettingsNote: Endpoint can be the service root; Promptor appends /chat/completions automatically. Ollama defaults to local http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions.

apiSettingsHints.endpoint: Leave empty to use the selected provider preset; custom services can use a root URL.
apiSettingsHints.apiKey: Most providers require an authorization key except local Ollama.
apiSettingsHints.model: Uses the selected provider preset by default; override it when needed.
apiSettingsHints.maxTokens: Maximum output token count for the optimized prompt.

apiSettingsValidation.maxTokens: Max Tokens must be a positive integer.

promptor.logEmptyDescription: Optimization history will appear here after you run a task.
promptor.outputPlaceholder: The optimized prompt will appear here

taskExecution.label: General task
taskExecution.description: Use CRISPE to clarify goals, steps, and acceptance criteria

coding.label: Coding
coding.description: Add stack, boundaries, tests, and output requirements

writing.label: Writing
writing.description: Clarify audience, tone, structure, and revision rules

researchAnalysis.label: Research
researchAnalysis.description: Strengthen scope, evidence, criteria, and conclusion format

extraction.label: Extraction
extraction.description: Define fields, rules, missing values, and structured output

reviewEvaluation.label: Review
reviewEvaluation.description: Focus criteria, evidence, severity, and improvements

agentWorkflow.label: Agent workflow
agentWorkflow.description: Plan multi-step execution, tool boundaries, and verification

messages.apiKeyRequired: Configure an API key or custom endpoint first.

migration.workspaceDescription: Review profile properties, inspect migration files, and execute schema actions without leaving the current workspace.
migration.executionLogDescription: Review the latest migration execution and file operation output.
migration.editingHint: Enable editing before saving changes. Exiting edit mode discards unsaved content.

messages.noMigrationSelected: -- Select a migration from the left --
messages.rollbackOnlyLatest: EF Core can only remove the latest migration via dotnet ef migrations remove.
messages.rollbackApplied: The database will roll back to the previous migration before removing the migration files.
messages.rollbackPending: This will run dotnet ef migrations remove and update the ModelSnapshot.
messages.deleteProfileNote: Make sure there are no unsaved configuration changes first.
messages.editProfileDescription: Update the project path, database type, and connection settings.
messages.profilesReloadedLog: Reloaded profile list from configuration store
messages.migrationsLoadedLog: Loaded {0} migration(s) via 'dotnet ef migrations list'
messages.newMigrationPrompt: Enter a migration name. PascalCase is recommended.
messages.newMigrationNote: Migration names must be at least 3 characters long.
messages.executeUpdateNote: Confirm the connection string and project path before continuing.
messages.rollbackStepsApplied:
1. dotnet ef database update <previous> (execute Down)
2. dotnet ef migrations remove (remove files and update ModelSnapshot)
messages.rollbackStepsPending: 1. dotnet ef migrations remove (remove files and update ModelSnapshot)
messages.rollbackNote: Only the latest migration can be removed.
messages.migrationFileMissingContent: // Migration file path is missing. Confirm the output directory contains the generated migration files.

validation.selectDomainProject: Select the Domain project for the current profile first.
validation.migrationNameTooShort: Migration names must be at least 3 characters long.

runtime.managedAppsDescription: Profiles remain lightweight. Deployment, runtime state, and search all stay in one list.
runtime.emptyDescription: Create a profile, upload a release zip, then start the deployed runtime.
runtime.runtimeDefinitionDescription: Keep configuration terse: identity, entry, startup mode, and environment injection.
runtime.name: Name
runtime.environmentHelp: One variable per line, format: KEY=VALUE.
runtime.runtimeLogDescription: Standard output, standard error, deployment events, and persisted host messages.
runtime.searchPlaceholder: Search runtime profiles by name or entry
runtime.headerContext: Deploy release packages, inject startup variables, and control local .NET runtimes from one workspace.

messages.deleteProfileMessage: Delete "{0}" and remove its runtime workspace?
messages.deployBeforeStart: Deploy a release package before starting the runtime.
messages.entryFileNotFound: Runtime entry file was not found.
messages.processDidNotStart: The runtime process did not start.
